Hero.subtitle: Tasks, projects, chat, analytics, HR, files and more — all in one app that works the way your team works.
Hero.note: Takes a minute to set up · Free

Problem.heading: One app — complete workflow
Problem.subtitle: From task to analytics without switching between tools
Problem.c1_desc: Set a deadline on a task — it appears in Calendar. Log time — it shows up in Analytics. Modules share data automatically.
Problem.c2_desc: Discussions, files, tasks and decisions — all in one place. A new team member gets up to speed in an hour, not a week.
Problem.c3_desc: Who's working on what, which deadlines are approaching, how loaded the team is — all visible in real time, no manual reports.
Problem.c4_desc: Register, add your first tasks, invite your team — and you're ready to go. No complex setup, no lengthy onboarding.

Modules.heading: 14+ modules. One app.
Modules.subtitle: All your team's tools in one place — and they all know about each other

Features.heading: Everything your team needs
Features.subtitle: Modules aren't isolated — they enrich each other
Features.f1_title: Kanban, sprints, priorities — all in one place
Features.f1_desc: Manage tasks any way you like: Kanban board, list, or backlog. Deadlines automatically appear in Calendar. Project progress is visible on the burndown chart in Analytics.
Features.f2_title: The full picture without extra dashboards
Features.f2_desc: Burndown charts, team workload, task stats — all updated in real time. No more manually gathering data from different sources.
Features.f3_title: Team communication right in the context of work
Features.f3_desc: Channels, direct messages, threads, files — all alongside your tasks. Turn any message into a task with one click.

Comparison.heading: Designed from the ground up
Comparison.subtitle: Modules that work together, not just side by side
Comparison.b1_desc: A task deadline becomes a Calendar event. Time logged on a task becomes an Analytics entry. A file from Chat is stored in Files. Data flows on its own.
Comparison.b2_desc: Interface in multiple languages, date and time in your timezone, full dark mode support. The app adapts to your team, not the other way around.
Comparison.b3_desc: Burndown, team workload, activity, audit log — all in one dashboard. Decisions are made based on data, not intuition.
Comparison.b4_desc: Enable only the modules you need. Configure roles at the project level. API and webhooks for integration with your existing tools.
Comparison.b5_desc: Granular roles, full action audit, API keys with scope and IP restrictions. Your data stays under your control.
Comparison.b6_desc: AIOHub grows with your team. New modules, integrations and features ship regularly. Your feedback directly shapes the roadmap.

Pricing.heading: Free for now
Pricing.subtitle: AIOHub is in early access. All features are fully open — while we build the product together with our first users.
Pricing.footnote: Paid plans with extended features are coming in the future. Current users will receive special terms.

Roadmap.heading: AIOHub is growing fast
Roadmap.desc: New modules and features ship regularly. Your feedback goes straight into the roadmap — we build the product together with the teams using it.
Roadmap.link: Leave feedback and shape the roadmap →

CTA.heading: Try AIOHub
CTA.desc: Takes a minute to sign up. All modules are open. If it works for your team — we'd love to have you.
CTA.cta_secondary: Already have an account? Log in

Footer.brand_desc: The operating system for your team. Tasks, chat, analytics and 11 more modules in one place.
